faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions

q1.question: Is WeLovePDF free to use?
q1.answer: Yes! All basic PDF tools are completely free. We offer premium features for advanced needs.

q2.question: Are my files secure?
q2.answer: Absolutely. We use end-to-end encryption and automatically delete files after 1 hour.

q3.question: What file sizes are supported?
q3.answer: We support files up to 100MB for free users and up to 2GB for premium users.

q4.question: Do I need to install any software?
q4.answer: No installation required. WeLovePDF works entirely in your browser.

q5.question: Can I use it on mobile?
q5.answer: Yes! Our website is fully responsive and works perfectly on all mobile devices.

q6.question: How fast is the processing?
q6.answer: Most operations complete in under 2 seconds for average-sized files. We use parallel processing, Web Workers, and optimized algorithms for maximum speed.

q7.question: What PDF tools do you offer?
q7.answer: We offer 14+ tools including merge, split, compress, convert (PDF to Word, Excel, PPT, JPG), rotate, protect, unlock, watermark, page numbering, organize, and AI-powered summarization.

q8.question: Do you have an API for developers?
q8.answer: Yes, we offer a comprehensive REST API for developers. You can integrate our PDF processing capabilities directly into your applications with detailed documentation and SDKs.

faq.subtitle: Get answers to common questions about WeLovePDF.

merge_pdf.title: Merge PDF
merge_pdf.description: Combine multiple PDF files into a single document. Upload your files, arrange them in order, and download the merged result.
merge_pdf.seo_h1: Merge PDF Files Online for Free

seo_faq.question: Is PDF merging free?
seo_faq.answer: Yes, our PDF merger is completely free with no hidden charges. You can merge unlimited files without registration.

seo_faq.question: Can I reorder pages before merging?
seo_faq.answer: Yes, you can drag and drop files to rearrange them in any order before merging. The merged PDF will follow your specified order.

seo_faq.question: Is there a file size limit?
seo_faq.answer: You can merge PDFs up to 100MB each for free. For larger files, consider using our premium plan.

seo_faq.question: How many PDFs can I merge at once?
seo_faq.answer: You can merge up to 20 PDF files at once. If you need to merge more, simply process them in batches.

seo_faq.question: Is my data secure?
seo_faq.answer: Absolutely. All files are processed securely with end-to-end encryption and are automatically deleted from our servers after 1 hour.

merge_pdf.step2: Arrange them in the desired order

merge_pdf.no_files_toast: No files to merge. Please upload files first.

merge_pdf.tips_order: Drag files up or down to arrange them in the desired order
merge_pdf.tips_quality: The quality of the merged PDF matches the original files

compress_pdf.title: Compress PDF
compress_pdf.description: Reduce PDF file size while maintaining quality. Choose compression level based on your needs.
compress_pdf.seo_h1: Compress PDF Files Online for Free

seo_faq.question: Is PDF compression safe?
seo_faq.answer: Yes, compression only optimizes images and removes unnecessary metadata. Your document content remains completely intact.

seo_faq.question: How much can I reduce my PDF size?
seo_faq.answer: Depending on the content, you can reduce file size by 20–90%. PDFs with large images benefit the most from compression.

seo_faq.question: Will compression affect the quality of my PDF?
seo_faq.answer: Low and medium compression preserve excellent visual quality. High compression reduces size the most but may slightly affect image sharpness.

seo_faq.question: Is there a file size limit?
seo_faq.answer: You can compress PDFs up to 100MB for free. For larger files, consider our premium plan.

split_pdf.title: Split PDF
split_pdf.description: Split a PDF into multiple files or extract specific pages.
split_pdf.seo_h1: Split PDF Files Online for Free

seo_faq.question: Can I split a PDF into individual pages?
seo_faq.answer: Yes! Our tool lets you split a PDF into individual pages, by page range, or every N pages — whatever you need.

seo_faq.question: How do I extract specific pages from a PDF?
seo_faq.answer: Use 'Extract Pages' mode and enter the page numbers you want, separated by commas (e.g. 1, 3, 5-7). The tool creates a new PDF with only those pages.

seo_faq.question: Will splitting change the PDF quality?
seo_faq.answer: No. Splitting only separates pages — the content, images, and formatting of each page remain exactly as in the original.

seo_faq.question: Is the split PDF downloaded as a ZIP?
seo_faq.answer: When splitting into multiple files, the result is packaged as a ZIP archive for easy download. Single-file extractions download directly.

pdf_to_word.title: PDF to Word
pdf_to_word.description: Convert PDF files to editable Word documents (.docx) with high accuracy.
pdf_to_word.seo_h1: Convert PDF to Word Online for Free
pdf_to_word.seo_h2: How to Convert PDF to Word

seo_faq.question: Will the formatting be preserved?
seo_faq.answer: Yes, our converter preserves the original layout, fonts, images, and table structures in the resulting Word document.

seo_faq.question: Can I convert a scanned PDF to Word?
seo_faq.answer: Yes! Our tool uses OCR (Optical Character Recognition) to extract text from scanned PDFs and create editable Word documents.

seo_faq.question: Is there a file size limit?
seo_faq.answer: You can convert PDFs up to 100MB for free. Larger files may be processed with our premium plan.

seo_faq.question: What Word format will I receive?
seo_faq.answer: You'll receive a .docx file compatible with Microsoft Word, Google Docs, LibreOffice, and other word processors.

word_to_pdf.title: Word to PDF
word_to_pdf.description: Convert Word documents (.doc, .docx) to PDF format.
word_to_pdf.seo_h1: Convert Word to PDF Online for Free
word_to_pdf.seo_h2: How to Convert Word to PDF

seo_faq.question: Will the Word formatting be preserved?
seo_faq.answer: Yes, our converter maintains fonts, images, tables, and layout exactly as in the original Word document.

seo_faq.question: Can I convert .doc and .docx files?
seo_faq.answer: Yes, we support both the older .doc format and the modern .docx format.

seo_faq.question: Is the conversion free?
seo_faq.answer: Yes, converting Word to PDF is completely free with no registration required.

seo_faq.question: Will the PDF be editable?
seo_faq.answer: The output PDF preserves your document layout and is not editable by default, which is ideal for sharing and printing.

pdf_to_jpg.title: PDF to JPG
pdf_to_jpg.description: Convert PDF pages to high-quality JPG images. Extract all pages or specific ones.
pdf_to_jpg.seo_h1: Convert PDF to JPG Online for Free
pdf_to_jpg.seo_h2: How to Convert PDF to JPG

seo_faq.question: Can I convert all pages at once?
seo_faq.answer: Yes, you can convert all pages of your PDF to individual JPG images in one operation. They are delivered in a ZIP archive.

seo_faq.question: What quality will the images be?
seo_faq.answer: You can choose the output quality. Higher quality produces sharper images at larger file sizes.

seo_faq.question: Can I extract just one page?
seo_faq.answer: Yes, use 'Specific Page' mode and enter the page number you want to extract as a JPG.

seo_faq.question: Is the conversion free?
seo_faq.answer: Yes, PDF to JPG conversion is completely free with no registration required.

jpg_to_pdf.title: JPG to PDF
jpg_to_pdf.description: Convert JPG, PNG, or other image formats to a single PDF document.
jpg_to_pdf.seo_h1: Convert JPG to PDF Online for Free
jpg_to_pdf.seo_h2: How to Convert Images to PDF

seo_faq.question: Can I combine multiple images into one PDF?
seo_faq.answer: Yes! Upload multiple images and they will all be combined into a single PDF document in the order you upload them.

seo_faq.question: What image formats are supported?
seo_faq.answer: We support JPG, PNG, GIF, WebP, BMP, and TIFF image formats.

seo_faq.question: Can I choose the page size and orientation?
seo_faq.answer: Yes, you can choose between portrait and landscape orientation and page sizes like A4, Letter, and Legal.

seo_faq.question: Is the conversion free?
seo_faq.answer: Yes, converting images to PDF is completely free with no registration required.

protect_pdf.title: Protect PDF
protect_pdf.description: Add password protection and encryption to your PDF files.
protect_pdf.seo_h1: Protect PDF with Password Online for Free
protect_pdf.seo_h2: How to Password Protect a PDF

seo_faq.question: What encryption standard is used?
seo_faq.answer: We use AES-256 encryption — the same military-grade standard used by banks and governments — to protect your PDF.

seo_faq.question: Can I control what the recipient can do with the PDF?
seo_faq.answer: Yes, you can restrict printing, copying text, and modifying the document independently from the open password.

seo_faq.question: What happens if I forget the password?
seo_faq.answer: There is no way to recover a lost password for an encrypted PDF. Please save your password somewhere safe before applying protection.

seo_faq.question: Is the protection permanent?
seo_faq.answer: Yes, the password protection is embedded in the PDF itself, so it remains active regardless of how the file is shared or stored.

organize_pdf.title: Organize PDF
organize_pdf.description: Reorder, rotate, or delete pages in your PDF document.
organize_pdf.seo_h1: Organize PDF Pages Online for Free

seo_faq.question: Can I organize multiple PDFs at once?
seo_faq.answer: Yes! You can upload multiple PDF files and organize their pages together as if they were a single document.

seo_faq.question: How do I reorder pages?
seo_faq.answer: Simply drag and drop page thumbnails to rearrange them. You can also use our sorting options to automatically organize pages ascending or descending.

seo_faq.question: Can I delete pages from my PDF?
seo_faq.answer: Absolutely. Hover over any page and click the trash icon to delete it. Use 'Reset to Original' to restore all deleted pages.

seo_faq.question: Is there a limit to the number of pages I can organize?
seo_faq.answer: Our free tier supports PDFs with up to 500 pages. For larger documents, consider splitting them first or upgrading to our premium plan.

add_watermark.title: Add Watermark
add_watermark.description: Add text or image watermarks to your PDF pages.
add_watermark.seo_h1: Add Watermark to PDF Online for Free
add_watermark.seo_h2: How to Add a Watermark to PDF

seo_faq.question: Can I customize the watermark appearance?
seo_faq.answer: Yes, you can customize the text, font size, color, opacity, rotation, and position of the watermark.

seo_faq.question: Can I watermark only specific pages?
seo_faq.answer: Yes, you can apply the watermark to all pages, only the first page, or a custom range of pages.

seo_faq.question: Will the watermark cover my content?
seo_faq.answer: You can control the opacity to make the watermark subtle. A typical 30–50% opacity is visible but doesn't obscure your content.

seo_faq.question: Is watermarking free?
seo_faq.answer: Yes, adding watermarks to PDFs is completely free with no registration required.

add_watermark.text_watermark_placeholder: Enter watermark text (e.g., We Love PDF)

page_numbering.title: Page Numbering
page_numbering.description: Add page numbers to your PDF documents with customizable format and position.
page_numbering.start_number_hint: Page 1 will be numbered as this value
page_numbering.format_template_hint: Use '{n}' for page number and '{total}' for total pages. Preview:
page_numbering.success_message: Page numbers have been added successfully!
page_numbering.download_failed: Download failed. Please use the manual download button.
page_numbering.seo_h1: Add Page Numbers to PDF Online for Free
page_numbering.seo_h2: How to Add Page Numbers to PDF

seo_faq.question: Can I skip the first page or title page?
seo_faq.answer: Yes! You can specify which pages should be numbered. Common setups include skipping the cover page, starting numbering from page 2 or 3, or using Roman numerals for front matter.

seo_faq.question: What number formats are available?
seo_faq.answer: We support Arabic numerals (1, 2, 3), Roman numerals (I, II, III, i, ii, iii), alphabetic (A, B, C), and custom formats. You can also add prefixes like 'Page' or suffixes like 'of 50'.

seo_faq.question: Can I add page numbers to multiple PDFs at once?
seo_faq.answer: Yes, you can upload multiple PDF files and apply the same page numbering settings to all of them simultaneously, saving you time on batch processing.

seo_faq.question: Will adding page numbers affect my document's layout?
seo_faq.answer: No, page numbers are added as a separate layer and don't interfere with your existing content. The tool automatically adjusts spacing to ensure your content remains intact.

pdf_to_excel.title: PDF to Excel
pdf_to_excel.description: Extract tables from your PDF files and convert them into editable Excel spreadsheets. Our converter preserves rows, columns, and table structure for accurate data extraction.
pdf_to_excel.seo_h1: Convert PDF to Excel Online for Free
pdf_to_excel.seo_h2: How to Convert PDF to Excel

seo_faq.question: What kind of PDFs work best?
seo_faq.answer: PDFs with clearly structured tables — rows, columns, and borders — yield the best results. Scanned PDFs are also supported via OCR.

seo_faq.question: Will all tables be extracted?
seo_faq.answer: Yes, our tool automatically detects all tables in the PDF and creates separate Excel sheets for each one.

seo_faq.question: Is the conversion free?
seo_faq.answer: Yes, converting PDFs to Excel is completely free with no registration required.

seo_faq.question: What Excel format will I receive?
seo_faq.answer: You will receive an .xlsx file compatible with Microsoft Excel, Google Sheets, LibreOffice Calc, and other spreadsheet applications.

pdf_to_excel.upload_description: Upload a PDF to extract tables and convert to Excel format.
pdf_to_excel.download_hint: If download doesn't start automatically, click the button above.
pdf_to_excel.conversion_failed: Failed to convert PDF to Excel
pdf_to_excel.upload_pdf_first: Please upload a PDF file first
pdf_to_excel.why_convert_desc: Extract table data from PDFs and work with it in Excel for analysis and calculations.
pdf_to_excel.feature_tables_desc: Automatically detects and extracts tables from your PDF documents.
pdf_to_excel.feature_accuracy_desc: Preserves rows, columns, and cell data with precision.
pdf_to_excel.feature_multi_desc: Creates separate Excel sheets for each table found in the PDF.
pdf_to_excel.tips_tables: Works best with PDFs containing clear table structures
pdf_to_excel.tips_scanned: Scanned PDFs with tables will be processed with OCR
pdf_to_excel.tips_review: Review extracted data for accuracy before use

excel_to_pdf.title: Excel to PDF
excel_to_pdf.description: Transform your Excel spreadsheets into professional PDF documents. Our converter maintains table structure, formatting, and supports multiple sheets for perfect conversion every time.
excel_to_pdf.seo_h1: Convert Excel to PDF Online for Free
excel_to_pdf.seo_h2: How to Convert Excel to PDF

seo_faq.question: Will all sheets be included in the PDF?
seo_faq.answer: Yes, all sheets in your Excel workbook are converted and included as separate pages in the output PDF.

seo_faq.question: Will the formatting be preserved?
seo_faq.answer: Yes, cell styles, colors, borders, fonts, and number formatting are all preserved in the output PDF.

seo_faq.question: Is the conversion free?
seo_faq.answer: Yes, converting Excel to PDF is completely free with no registration required.

seo_faq.question: What Excel formats are supported?
seo_faq.answer: We support both .xls and .xlsx file formats.

excel_to_pdf.upload_description: Upload an Excel spreadsheet to convert it to a professional PDF.
excel_to_pdf.download_hint: If download doesn't start automatically, click the button above.

excel_to_pdf.upload_excel_first: Please upload an Excel file first
excel_to_pdf.why_convert_desc: Share your spreadsheet data in a professional, non-editable PDF format.
excel_to_pdf.feature_formatting_desc: Maintains cell styles, colors, borders, and number formatting.
excel_to_pdf.feature_sheets_desc: Converts all sheets in your workbook to individual PDF pages.
excel_to_pdf.feature_professional_desc: Creates clean, print-ready PDF documents from your spreadsheets.
excel_to_pdf.tips_format: Format your spreadsheet before converting for best results
excel_to_pdf.tips_sheets: All sheets will be included in the output PDF
excel_to_pdf.tips_print: Use print preview in Excel first to check layout

ai_tools.title: AI-Powered PDF Tools
ai_tools.description: Analyze, summarize, and extract insights from your PDF documents using advanced AI.
ai_tools.hero_description: Transform your PDF documents with advanced AI. Summarize, analyze, and extract insights from your PDFs in seconds.
ai_tools.how_it_works_text: Our AI models are trained on millions of documents to understand context, extract key information, and generate human-like summaries. We use state-of-the-art language models optimized for document analysis.

ai_tools.section_subtitle: Upload your PDF and let our AI extract key insights, generate summaries, and analyze content in seconds.

about.title: About WeLovePDF
about.description: Learn about our mission, team, and commitment to providing the best PDF tools.
about.hero_description: WeLovePDF was founded with a simple mission: to make PDF processing accessible, secure, and effortless for everyone. No complicated software, no privacy concerns, just powerful tools that work right in your browser.
about.mission_text: To democratize PDF processing by providing free, high-quality tools that anyone can use regardless of technical expertise. We believe everyone deserves access to professional-grade document tools without cost barriers.
about.values_privacy_text: Your documents never leave your browser
about.values_innovation_text: Constantly improving with AI and new features
about.team_subtitle: Passionate experts dedicated to improving your PDF experience
about.team_member_1_bio: Former Google engineer with 10+ years in document processing
about.team_member_2_bio: Product leader from Adobe with expertise in PDF technologies
about.team_member_3_bio: Full-stack developer specializing in browser-based processing
about.team_member_4_bio: Cybersecurity expert focused on data privacy and encryption
about.journey_subtitle: From a simple idea to serving millions worldwide
about.milestone_2020: Founded with a vision to simplify PDF processing
about.milestone_2021: Launched first 5 PDF tools with browser-based processing
about.milestone_2022: Reached 1 million users and added AI features
about.milestone_2023: Expanded to 14+ tools with multi-language support
about.milestone_2024: Achieved 5 million users with enterprise features
about.cta_description: Help us make PDF processing better for everyone

pricing_page.title: Pricing
pricing_page.description: Choose the plan that works best for you. All plans include our core PDF tools.
pricing_page.hero_description: Choose the perfect plan for your PDF needs. No hidden fees, no surprises. Start with our free plan or try Pro free for 14 days.
pricing_page.comparison_subtitle: See how our plans stack up against each other
pricing_page.faq_subtitle: Get answers to common questions about our pricing and plans
pricing_page.faq_1_q: Can I cancel my subscription anytime?
pricing_page.faq_1_a: Yes, you can cancel your subscription at any time. Your Pro/Business features will remain active until the end of your billing period.
pricing_page.faq_2_q: Is there a free trial for Pro plan?
pricing_page.faq_2_a: Yes, we offer a 14-day free trial for the Pro plan. No credit card required to start the trial.
pricing_page.faq_3_q: What payment methods do you accept?
pricing_page.faq_3_a: We accept all major credit cards (Visa, MasterCard, American Express), PayPal, and bank transfers for Business plans.
pricing_page.faq_4_q: Do you offer discounts for non-profits?
pricing_page.faq_4_a: Yes, we offer a 50% discount for registered non-profit organizations. Contact our sales team with your documentation.
pricing_page.faq_5_q: Can I upgrade or downgrade my plan?
pricing_page.faq_5_a: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. When upgrading, you'll be charged the prorated difference. When downgrading, changes take effect at the next billing cycle.
pricing_page.faq_6_a: Absolutely. All files are encrypted in transit and at rest. We automatically delete files after the retention period, and we never share your data with third parties.
pricing_page.cta_heading: Ready to Transform Your PDF Workflow?
pricing_page.cta_description: Join thousands of professionals who trust WeLovePDF for their document needs.
pricing_page.cta_footer: No credit card required • 14-day free trial • Cancel anytime

contact_page.title: Contact Us
contact_page.description: Get in touch with our team. We're here to help.
contact_page.hero_description: Have questions, feedback, or need support? We're here to help you with all your PDF needs. Our team is ready to assist you.
contact_page.form_subtitle: Fill out the form below and we'll get back to you as soon as possible.
contact_page.message_placeholder: Please describe your inquiry in detail...
contact_page.about_text: WeLovePDF is a leading online PDF solution trusted by millions of users worldwide. Our mission is to make PDF processing simple, secure, and accessible to everyone.
contact_page.response_time_value: Typically within 24 hours during business days
contact_page.faq_1_q: How long does it take to get a response?
contact_page.faq_1_a: We typically respond to all inquiries within 24 hours during business days. For urgent matters, please use our phone support.
contact_page.faq_2_a: Yes! We provide custom enterprise solutions for businesses with high-volume PDF processing needs. Contact our sales team for a demo.
contact_page.faq_3_q: Can I suggest a new feature?
contact_page.faq_3_a: Absolutely! We love hearing from our users. Please use the feedback form or email us directly with your suggestions.
contact_page.faq_4_q: Is there a limit to file size?
contact_page.faq_4_a: Our free tier supports files up to 100MB. For larger files, consider our premium plans or contact us for enterprise solutions.
contact_page.cta_description: Our support team is available to help you with any urgent matters.
